race.comment: GAEILGE (1) looks well placed. He was a dominant winner first up at Seymour, backed into $1.20 and scoring by an easy three lengths. He was a bit disappointing next time at Cranbourne but this looks a fair bit easier and he can bounce right back. JETT SMASH (2) resumes having gone to the paddock a maiden winner at Mornington, just his second start to date. He should have progressed over the spell and can run a forward race. SMALL TOWN HERO (6) just found one better at Stony Creek last time out under 61kg. This is slightly harder but he's fit and will do no work on speed from the inside gate. BENCOUVER (5) resumes. He struggles to win but could get into a good spot here and run a cheeky race. FAITHINHER (10) was solid last time at Seymour when second and has each-way claims again.
